findings.title: Gateway binds beyond loopback without authentication
findings.detail: Gateway bind is set to "lan" but no authentication is configured.
findings.remediation: Set gateway.auth.mode to "token" or change gateway.bind to "loopback"

findings.title: Control UI allows insecure HTTP authentication
findings.detail: The Control UI accepts authentication over unencrypted HTTP connections.

findings.title: Browser control endpoints have no authentication
findings.detail: Browser control is enabled but no authentication method is configured.

findings.title: Discord DMs are open to anyone
findings.detail: Any Discord user can send direct messages to your agent.

findings.title: Gateway token is too short
findings.detail: The gateway token is shorter than the recommended 24 characters.

findings.title: Hooks token is too short
findings.detail: The hooks token is shorter than 24 characters.

findings.title: Tool output redaction is disabled
findings.detail: Sensitive data in tool outputs will be logged without redaction.

findings.title: Attack surface summary
findings.detail: 2 open groups, 3 elevated tools, 1 webhook, browser control enabled

findings.title: Tailscale Serve is enabled
findings.detail: Agent is accessible via Tailscale Serve (tailnet-only).
